strategy: Raid boss with 100% resist to every school, so you must break his resist with Shatter or heavy pierce and traps before damage lands. Bring a coordinated team.
He triple-Dispels your school at the start of combat and again every third round, so your school's spells get eaten. Attack with an off-school spell or a prism-converted hit that dodges the Dispels.
Have supports stack pierce and Shatter and traps, the hitter lands off-school damage once his resist is cracked.
Refresh your setup after each Round-3 Dispel wave, do not queue your main-school nuke into a Dispel.
Healer keeps the team alive through his 200% outgoing damage, burst him in the windows between Dispels.
cheatNotes: At the start of combat he lands a triple Dispel on your school, so your next same-school casts get eaten, attack off-school or through a prism.
He re-Dispels your school every third round, do not queue your main-school nuke into Rounds 3, 6, 9 and so on.
